'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 9''' was published in June [[1978]] by [[Paradise Press]]. This was described on the cover as a "Special Issue", though it is unclear how it was different from the other issues of the magazine.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"[[Ralph McQuarrie]]: Visualizer", by [[John May]]: a look at Ralph McQuarrie and his paintings and designs for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|the original film]].
*"Systems in Collision", by [[Brian Shepherd]]: a discussion of the differences between the evil [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and the origins of their [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|conflict]].
*"The Brain of the '[[Droid/Legends|Droid]]," by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: an article on the state of the art in [[Wikipedia: Artificial intelligence|Artificial intelligence]] as of 1978, and speculation about the future.
